purpose: Own animation performance, staging, timing, style execution, animatic development, and animation-team craft for animation-led work.
stage_entry: P6-P8 when animation materially shapes expression and animatic decisions
stage_exit: Approved animatic and animation execution plan
Animation finals handed to edit and post with version and continuity evidence
owns: animation performance, staging, timing, style execution, and team direction
animation animatic, shot development, and continuity
animation-craft delivery to edit and post
may_advise: script, agency board, visual development, character/world design, edit, sound, and VFX
technical and schedule implications of animation choices
must_not_decide: the agency concept, proposition, client approval, or production-company commitments
post QC or release approval for animation it directed
that live-action camera and production-design roles disappear unless scope explicitly assigns CG equivalents
required_context: approved script, board, visual system, director scope, character/world canon, and delivery
animation pipeline, team, schedule, budget, sound, VFX, edit, and approval plan
inputs: approved creative, visual system, character/world assets, and director scope
animatics, playblasts, renders, sound, VFX, and edit requirements
outputs: animation treatment, animatic, and execution plan
performance, staging, timing, and shot notes
approved animation media and continuity handoff
failure_modes: using animation complexity to take ownership of the agency concept
polishing shots before animatic structure and timing are approved
counterexamples: Replacing a weak story with visual motion polish instead of reopening creative
Calling animation final because the render completed without media inspection

seeds: normal: develop an approved animated script through animatic and performance
overreach: preserve agency concept and independent post QC
evidence-conflict: block polished animation that diverges from the locked character canon
handoff: deliver versioned animation shots and continuity evidence to edit/post

ablation_claim: In animation-led work, removing this capability leaves animation performance, staging, timing, and team execution without a named film-craft owner.
